name: taskdisc-actionable-backlog-fail
description: T2 canned-runner fixture: most open issues lack labels/milestones or bodies, so taskdisc.actionable_backlog_items fails (<60% actionable). Exercises the T2 fail shape end-to-end through the real engine with a no-network gh runner.

github.api repos/o/r/issues?state=open&per_page: [{"number": 1, "labels": [], "body": ""}, {"number": 2, "body": "   "}, {"number": 3, "labels": [{"name": "bug"}], "body": "The only actionable item in the backlog."}]
